creator: oliver@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

cyrus-sasl2 was modified by a custom patch like 
http://www.readaccess.com/~lopaka/sysadmin/cyrus-sasl-mysql-encrypt/software-sources/patch 
which added the dependency to libcrypt w/o saving this dependency in the library itself. 
Because of the modification which generates a different libsasl2.so I won't modify courier-authlib-ldap because by using the "out of the box" cyrus-sasl2 port, courier-authlib just works fine.
